metadata.title:
TAKE BAN OFF CHINESE TO


BUST LAUNDRY TRUST

pages.raw_text:
According to local labor leaders
a Laundry Workers union will be
organized in this city in the near
future or Chinese laundries will re-
ceive the encouragement of organ
lied labor as against the laundry
trust. 1t is we'll known that to or
ganized labor belongs the credit
for the Punishment of the Chinese
laundries from the Western cities.
AS an example it is shown that a
few years ago Butte had only one
white laundry and that was not a
paying proposition. The owners
contributed largely to the expense
Of the campaign inaugurated in
that city for the closing of the
Chinese laundries. In compare
lively short time white laundries
had replaced the Chinese.


Spokane union men say that
they can do great amount Of
damage to the local trust by remov-
ing the boycott from Chinese.


There is also possibility that
some local restaurant and hotel
proprietors and the union people
may be successful in starting an
